summary: Made surgical seam edits to clarify that Owen has been sitting on the manuscript for nearly two days before entering the Room of Requirement, and to hand the chapter out on his shift from public explanation to private testing of what the pages want from his burned hand.
edits: Added a light entrance-time anchor tying Owen's arrival to the two-day gap after the manuscript discovery.
Preserved the existing Room of Requirement opening image and scene beats without changing chapter causality.
Extended the closing beat so Owen exits focused on what the pages want from his hand, bridging into chapter 4's Tuesday experiments.
